title: Paragon ActionKit Action
description: A pre-built Integration Tool exposed by Paragon ActionKit. Each action wraps a specific third-party SaaS operation and is callable by an AI agent or app on behalf of a Connected User.

description.description: Human-readable description suitable for use as an LLM tool description.

integration.description: Integration identifier the action belongs to (e.g., slack, salesforce).

parameters.description: JSON Schema describing the action's input parameters.
